Command.Name: service
Command.Description: Service lifecycle management: start, stop, status.

Command.Name: start
Command.Description: Start the PptMcp Service if not already running.

Command.Name: stop
Command.Description: Gracefully stop the PptMcp Service.

Command.Name: status
Command.Description: Show service status (running, PID, sessions, uptime).

Command.Name: batch
Command.Description: Execute multiple commands from a JSON file or stdin. Outputs NDJSON (one result per line).

Option.Description: JSON file with command array. Use '-' for stdin (NDJSON, one command per line). If omitted, reads from stdin.
Default session ID for all commands. Overridden by per-command sessionId. Auto-captured from session.open/create if not set.
Stop execution on first error (default: continue all commands).

Command.Name: diag
Command.Description: Diagnostic commands: ping, echo, validate-params.

Command.Name: ping
Command.Description: Ping the service to check connectivity.

Command.Name: echo
Command.Description: Echo back a message (tests parameter passing).

Option.Description: Message to echo back
Optional tag to include

Command.Name: validate-params
Command.Description: Validate parameter types and defaults.

Option.Description: Count parameter
Optional label
Name parameter (required)
Verbose flag

Command.Name: session
Command.Description: Session management. WORKFLOW: open -> use sessionId -> close (--save to persist).

Command.Name: create
Command.Description: Create a new PowerPoint file, open it, and create a session.

Argument.Name: FILE
Argument.Description: Path to the new PowerPoint file to create

Option.Description: Session timeout in seconds

Command.Name: open
Command.Description: Open a PowerPoint file and create a session.

Argument.Name: FILE
Argument.Description: Path to the PowerPoint file to open

Option.Description: Session timeout in seconds

Command.Name: close
Command.Description: Close a session. Use --save to persist changes.

Option.Description: Save changes before closing
Session ID to close

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: List active sessions.

Command.Name: save
Command.Description: Save a session without closing it.

Option.Description: Session ID to save

Command.Name: accessibility
Command.Description: Accessibility audit: check alt text, title placeholders, reading order.

Option.Description: Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
Comma-separated shape names in desired reading order (required for: set-reading-order)
1-based slide index (required for: get-reading-order, set-reading-order)

Command.Name: animation
Command.Description: Animation effect operations: list, add, remove, reorder effects on slides.

Option.Description: Delay before start in seconds (required for: set-timing)
Duration in seconds (required for: set-timing)
1-based index of the effect in the animation sequence (required for: remove, set-timing, reorder)
MsoAnimEffect integer (e.g., 1=Appear, 2=Fly, 10=Fade, 16=Wipe) (required for: add)
1-based target position in the sequence (required for: reorder)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
Name of the target shape (required for: add)
1-based slide index (required)
1=OnClick (default), 2=WithPrevious, 3=AfterPrevious (required for: add, set-timing)

Command.Name: background
Command.Description: Slide background: get, set solid color, set image, reset to master.

Option.Description: Hex color string (#RRGGBB) (required for: set-color)
First gradient color as hex (#RRGGBB) (required for: set-gradient)
Second gradient color as hex (#RRGGBB) (required for: set-gradient)
1=Horizontal, 2=Vertical, 3=DiagonalUp, 4=DiagonalDown, 5=FromCorner, 6=FromCenter (required for: set-gradient)
Path to the image file (required for: set-image)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
1-based slide index (required)

Command.Name: chart
Command.Description: Embedded chart operations: create, get info, set title, set type, delete.

Option.Description: Axis type: 1=Category(X), 2=Value(Y) (required for: set-axis-title)
XlChartType integer (e.g., 4=xlLine, 5=xlPie, 51=xlColumnClustered, -4169=xl3DColumn) (required for: create, set-type)
Height in points (required for: create)
Position from left in points (required for: create)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Legend position: -4107=Bottom, -4131=Left, -4152=Right, -4160=Top, -4161=TopRight (required for: set-legend)
Session ID from 'session open' command
Name of the chart shape (required for: get-info, set-title, set-type, delete, set-data, set-legend, read-data, set-axis-title, toggle-data-table)
1-based slide index (required)
Title text for the axis (required for: set-title, set-axis-title)
Position from top in points (required for: create)
2D array of values (rows × columns) (required for: set-data) (JSON format)
Whether the legend is visible (required for: set-legend, toggle-data-table)
Width in points (required for: create)

Command.Name: comment
Command.Description: Slide comments: list, add, delete.

Option.Description: Author name (required for: add)
1-based comment index (required for: delete)
Horizontal position in points (0 = top-left) (required for: add)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
1-based slide index, or 0 for all slides (required)
Comment text (required for: add)
Vertical position in points (0 = top-left) (required for: add)

Command.Name: customshow
Command.Description: Custom slide show management: list, create, delete, run.

Option.Description: Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
Name for the custom show (required for: create, delete)
Comma-separated 1-based slide indices (e.g. "1,3,5") (required for: create)

Command.Name: design
Command.Description: Design operations: themes, colors, fonts, and design knowledge catalog. THEME OPERATIONS (require open presentation): - list, apply-theme, get-colors, list-color-schemes, get-fonts DESIGN KNOWLEDGE CATALOG (query on demand): - list-archetypes / get-archetype: primary unified archetype surface with curated rules plus learned subtype/example coverage when local reference data is available - list-palettes / get-palette: 8 color palettes with hex values - list-style-profiles / get-style-profile: consulting/sales/startup configurations - list-layout-grids / get-layout-grid: exact x/y/w/h positioning coordinates - list-density-profiles / get-density-profile: D1-D5 content density rules - get-context-model: meeting type → audience → density mapping - get-deck-sequence: canonical slide sequences (decision, pitch, review) - get-slide-patterns: advanced consulting layout patterns - get-icon-shapes: native shape icon catalog

Option.Description: Archetype id: big-number, kpi-card-dashboard, operational-kpi, column-bar-chart, chart-insight-callout, framework, simple-table, waterfall-chart, comparison, timeline-roadmap, process-diagram, executive-summary, recommendations, quote, map, appendix, annotated-diagram, chart-and-commentary, org-chart, title-slide (required for: get-archetype)
Density id: D1, D2, D3, D4, D5 (required for: get-density-profile)
1-based design index (0 = first design) (required for: get-colors, get-fonts)

Grid id: single-column, two-column-equal, two-column-60-40, three-column, four-column, grid-2x2, grid-3x2, big-number, kpi-3-cards, kpi-4-cards, kpi-5-cards, chart-full, chart-callout, timeline, process-3-step, section-divider, title-dark-hero (required for: get-layout-grid)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Palette id: corporate-blue, slate-professional, modern-tech, confident-bold, warm-coral, academic-neutral, nature-calm, electric-minimal (required for: get-palette)
Profile id: consulting, corporate, sales, startup, keynote, educational, academic, creative (required for: get-style-profile)
Sequence id: S1 (Decision), S2 (Performance Review), S3 (Pitch/Proposal), S4 (Transformation), S5 (Regulatory) (required for: get-deck-sequence)
Session ID from 'session open' command
Full path to .thmx theme file (required for: apply-theme)

Command.Name: docproperty
Command.Description: Document property management: read and write presentation metadata like title, author, subject, keywords.

Option.Description: Author name (required for: set)
Category (required for: set)
Description or comments (required for: set)
Company or organization name (required for: set)
Keywords for search (comma-separated) (required for: set)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Custom property name (required for: get-custom, set-custom)
Property value (string) (required for: set-custom)
Session ID from 'session open' command
Subject or topic (required for: set)
Presentation title (required for: set)

Command.Name: export
Command.Description: Export presentations to PDF, images, or other formats.

Option.Description: Number of copies (default: 1) (required for: print)
Seconds per slide (default: 5) (required for: to-video)
Directory to save images (required for: all-slides-to-images, extract-images)
Output PDF file path (required for: to-pdf, slide-to-image, to-video, save-as, extract-text, save-copy)
Format code (1-7) (required for: save-as)
First slide to print (0 = from beginning) (required for: print)
Image height in pixels (default: 1080) (required for: slide-to-image, all-slides-to-images)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
1=1080p, 2=720p, 3=480p (required for: to-video)
Session ID from 'session open' command
1-based slide index (required for: slide-to-image)
Last slide to print (0 = to end) (required for: print)
Image width in pixels (default: 1920) (required for: slide-to-image, all-slides-to-images)

Command.Name: file
Command.Description: File management commands for PowerPoint presentations. Handles file validation and metadata retrieval.

Option.Description: Path to the .pptx or .pptm file (required)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.

Command.Name: headerfooter
Command.Description: Presentation headers and footers: get settings, set date/page number/footer text.

Option.Description: Footer text (null = don't change)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
Show date/time
Show footer on slides
Show slide numbers

Command.Name: hyperlink
Command.Description: Hyperlink management: add, remove, and get hyperlinks on shapes and text.

Option.Description: URL (https://...) or empty for slide link (required for: add)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Optional tooltip text shown on hover
Session ID from 'session open' command
Name of the shape to add hyperlink to (required for: add, get, remove)
1-based slide index (required for: add, get, remove)
Slide number for internal links (e.g. '3' to jump to slide 3), or empty

Command.Name: image
Command.Description: Image operations: insert pictures into slides.

Option.Description: Brightness value (0.0 to 1.0) (required for: set-brightness-contrast)
Hex color string (#RRGGBB) to make transparent (required for: set-transparent-color)
Contrast value (0.0 to 1.0) (required for: set-brightness-contrast)
Crop from bottom in points (0 = no crop) (required for: crop)
Crop from left in points (0 = no crop) (required for: crop)
Crop from right in points (0 = no crop) (required for: crop)
Crop from top in points (0 = no crop) (required for: crop)
Height in points (0 = original) (required for: insert)
Path to the image file (required for: insert)
Position from left in points (required for: insert)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
Name of the picture shape (required for: crop, set-brightness-contrast, set-transparent-color)
1-based slide index (required)
Position from top in points (required for: insert)
Width in points (0 = original) (required for: insert)

Command.Name: master
Command.Description: Slide master and layout operations: list masters, list layouts, get placeholders.

Option.Description: 1-based slide master index (required for: list-shapes, edit-shape-text, list-layouts)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
Name of the shape to edit (required for: edit-shape-text)
New text content (required for: edit-shape-text)

Command.Name: media
Command.Description: Media management: insert audio and video files into slides. Supports linking or embedding media files.

Option.Description: Fade-in duration in seconds, null to leave unchanged
Fade-out duration in seconds, null to leave unchanged
Full path to the audio file (required for: insert-audio, insert-video)
Height in points (0 = use video native height) (required for: insert-video)
Position from left in points (required for: insert-audio, insert-video)
If true, link to file instead of embedding (smaller file size) (required for: insert-audio, insert-video)
Mute state, null to leave unchanged
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
If true, save media with document when linking (required for: insert-audio)
Session ID from 'session open' command
Name of the media shape (required for: get-info, set-playback)
1-based slide index (required)
Position from top in points (required for: insert-audio, insert-video)
Volume level (0.0 to 1.0), null to leave unchanged
Width in points (0 = use video native width) (required for: insert-video)

Command.Name: notes
Command.Description: Speaker notes: get, set, clear.

Option.Description: Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
(required for: get, set, clear, append)
(required for: set, append)

Command.Name: pagesetup
Command.Description: Slide size and page setup operations.

Option.Description: The number to assign to the first slide (required for: set-first-number)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
Slide height in points. 0 = don't change. (required for: set-size)
Slide width in points (1 inch = 72 points). 0 = don't change. (required for: set-size)

Command.Name: placeholder
Command.Description: Slide placeholder operations: list available placeholders, fill text.

Option.Description: Absolute path to the image file (required for: set-image)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
1-based placeholder index (required for: set-text, set-image)
Session ID from 'session open' command
1-based slide index (required)
Text to set (required for: set-text)

Command.Name: printoptions
Command.Description: Manage print options: output type, color mode, framing, fit-to-page, hidden slides.

Option.Description: 1=Color, 2=Grayscale, 3=BlackWhite
Whether to fit slides to page
Whether to frame slides when printing
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
1=Slides, 2=TwoSlideHandouts, 3=ThreeSlideHandouts, 4=SixSlideHandouts, 5=NotesPages, 6=Outline
Whether to include hidden slides
Session ID from 'session open' command

Command.Name: proofing
Command.Description: Proofing and language operations: check spelling, get/set language for text.

Option.Description: MsoLanguageID value (e.g. 1033 for English US) (required for: set-language)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
Empty string for all shapes on slide, or specific shape name (required for: set-language, get-language)
0 for all slides, or specific 1-based slide index (required for: set-language, get-language)

Command.Name: section
Command.Description: Presentation section management: list, add, rename, delete, and move sections. Sections group slides for easier navigation and organization.

Option.Description: New section name (required for: rename)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
1-based section index (required for: rename, delete)
Name for the new section (required for: add)
Session ID from 'session open' command
1-based slide index where the section starts (required for: add)

Command.Name: shape
Command.Description: Shape management: list, read, create, move, resize, delete, z-order.

Option.Description: 0=None, 1=NextSlide, 2=PreviousSlide, 3=FirstSlide, 4=LastSlide, 7=Hyperlink (required for: set-action-settings)
(required for: set-alt-text)
MsoAutoShapeType integer (1=Rectangle, 9=Oval, etc.) (required for: add-shape)
0=None, 1=ShapeToFitText, 2=TextToFitShape (null = don't change)
Bevel top depth in points (null = don't change)
Bevel top type: 0=None, 1=Circle, 2=RelaxedInset, 3=Cross, 4=Angle, etc. (null = don't change)
Hex color string like #FF0000 for red, or 'none' for no fill (required for: set-fill, set-line, set-glow)
First gradient color as hex (#RRGGBB) (required for: set-gradient-fill)
Second gradient color as hex (#RRGGBB) (required for: set-gradient-fill)
1=Straight, 2=Elbow, 3=Curve (required for: add-connector)
(required for: set-rotation)
Ending shape name (required for: add-connector)
0=Horizontal, 1=Vertical (required for: flip)
Font name (e.g. "Arial") (required for: add-text-effect)
Font size in points (required for: add-text-effect)
1=Horizontal, 2=Vertical, 3=DiagonalUp, 4=DiagonalDown, 5=FromCorner, 6=FromCenter (required for: set-gradient-fill)
Height in points (required for: add-textbox, add-shape)
URL for actionType=7 (Hyperlink), ignored for other types
Position from left in points (required for: add-textbox, add-shape, add-text-effect)
Line width in points (default 0.75) (required for: set-line)
True to lock aspect ratio, false to unlock (required for: lock-aspect-ratio)
Bottom margin in points (null = don't change)
Left margin in points (null = don't change)
Right margin in points (null = don't change)
Top margin in points (null = don't change)
1=Union, 2=Combine, 3=Fragment, 4=Intersect, 5=Subtract (required for: merge)
Shadow offset X in points (required for: set-shadow)
Shadow offset Y in points (required for: set-shadow)
Opacity value from 0.0 (fully transparent) to 1.0 (fully opaque) (required for: set-opacity)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
MsoPresetTextEffect integer (0-based preset index) (required for: add-text-effect)
Glow radius in points (0 = remove glow) (required for: set-glow, set-soft-edge)
0=None, 1-9=msoReflectionType1 through msoReflectionType9 (required for: set-reflection)
X-axis rotation in degrees (null = don't change)
Y-axis rotation in degrees (null = don't change)
Z-axis rotation in degrees (null = don't change)
Width scale factor (e.g. 1.5 = 150%) (required for: scale)
Height scale factor (e.g. 1.5 = 150%) (required for: scale)
Session ID from 'session open' command

Name of the shape (required for: read, move-resize, delete, z-order, set-fill, set-line, set-rotation, ungroup, set-alt-text, copy-to-slide, set-shadow, duplicate, flip, set-text-frame, set-gradient-fill, set-glow, set-reflection, set-opacity, read-fill, read-line, set-action-settings, scale, lock-aspect-ratio, set-soft-edge, read-shadow, set-3d)
Comma-separated list of shape names to group (required for: group, merge)
MsoShapeType integer (1=AutoShape, 6=Group, 13=Picture, 14=Placeholder, 17=TextBox, etc.) (required for: find-by-type)
1-based slide index (required)
Name of the shape to copy formatting from (required for: copy-formatting)
Starting shape name (required for: add-connector)
Name of the shape to apply formatting to (required for: copy-formatting)
1-based target slide index (required for: copy-to-slide)
Initial text content (required for: add-textbox, add-text-effect)
Position from top in points (required for: add-textbox, add-shape, add-text-effect)
Show or hide shadow (required for: set-shadow)
Width in points (required for: add-textbox, add-shape)
Enable/disable word wrap (null = don't change)
1=BringToFront, 2=SendToBack, 3=BringForward, 4=SendBackward (required for: z-order)

Command.Name: shapealign
Command.Description: Shape alignment and distribution operations.

Option.Description: Alignment type (0-5) (required for: align)
0=Horizontally, 1=Vertically (required for: distribute)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
Comma-separated shape names (required)
1-based slide index (required)

Command.Name: slide
Command.Description: Slide lifecycle commands: list, read, create, duplicate, move, delete.

Option.Description: Number of clones to create (required for: clone-with-replace)
Full path for the output PNG file (required for: get-thumbnail)
Whether to display master shapes (required for: set-display-master)
Layout name from the slide master (e.g. "Title Slide", "Blank") (required for: create, apply-layout)
New name for the slide (required for: set-name)
1-based target position (required for: move)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
1-based insert position (0 = at end) (required for: create)
Text to replace with in each clone (required for: clone-with-replace)
Text to search for in each clone (required for: clone-with-replace)
Session ID from 'session open' command
1-based slide index (required for: read, duplicate, move, delete, apply-layout, set-name, clone-with-replace, hide, unhide, get-thumbnail, set-display-master, copy)

Command.Name: slideimport
Command.Description: Import slides from another presentation file.

Option.Description: Position to insert (0 = at end) (required)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
Comma-separated 1-based slide indices to import (empty = all) (required)
Path to the source .pptx file (required)

Command.Name: slideshow
Command.Description: Slideshow presentation mode: start, stop, navigate, get status.

Option.Description: Whether to loop the slideshow continuously (required for: configure)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
1=Speaker (full screen), 2=Browsed by individual (window), 3=Browsed at kiosk (loop) (required for: configure)
Whether to show animations during the slideshow (required for: configure)
Whether to play narrations during the slideshow (required for: configure)
1-based target slide index (required for: goto-slide)
1-based slide to start from (0 = beginning) (required for: start)

Command.Name: slidetable
Command.Description: Table shape operations: create, read, write cells, add/delete rows and columns, merge cells.

Option.Description: Border color as hex (#RRGGBB) (required for: set-cell-border)
1-based column index (required for: write-cell, delete-column, read-cell, format-cell, set-cell-border)
Number of columns (required for: create)
1-based end column (required for: merge-cells)
1-based end row (required for: merge-cells)
Hex fill color (#RRGGBB) or null to skip
Set bold (null = don't change)
Set font size (0 = don't change) (required for: format-cell)
Height in points (required for: create)
Position from left in points (required for: create)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
1-based position to insert (-1 = at end) (required for: add-row, add-column)
1-based row index (required for: write-cell, delete-row, read-cell, format-cell, write-row, read-row, set-cell-border)
Number of rows (required for: create)
Session ID from 'session open' command
Name of the table shape (required for: read, write-cell, add-row, add-column, delete-row, delete-column, merge-cells, read-cell, format-cell, write-row, read-row, set-cell-border)
1-based slide index (required)
1-based start column (required for: merge-cells)
1-based start row (required for: merge-cells)
Text alignment: left, center, right (null = don't change)
Position from top in points (required for: create)
Cell value to set (required for: write-cell)
Comma-separated values for the row (required for: write-row)
Width in points (required for: create, set-cell-border)

Command.Name: smartart
Command.Description: SmartArt diagram operations: create, add/remove nodes, change layout.

Option.Description: 1-based index into Application.SmartArtLayouts (required for: set-layout)
1-based index of the node to delete (required for: delete-node, change-level)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
True to promote (decrease level), false to demote (increase level) (required for: change-level)
Session ID from 'session open' command
Name of the SmartArt shape (required)
1-based slide index (required)
1-based index into Application.SmartArtQuickStyles (required for: set-style)
Text for the new node (required for: add-node)

Command.Name: tag
Command.Description: Custom tags/metadata on slides and shapes.

Option.Description: Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
Shape name (null/empty = slide-level tags)
1-based slide index (required)
Tag name (case-insensitive) (required for: set, delete)
Tag value (required for: set)

Command.Name: text
Command.Description: Text operations within shapes: get, set, format, find, replace.

Option.Description: Alignment
Bold
Custom bullet character (e.g. "•", "→") - only used when bulletType is 1
0=None, 1=Unnumbered (bullets), 2=Numbered (required for: set-bullets)
1=Sentence, 2=Lower, 3=Upper, 4=Title, 5=Toggle (required for: change-case)
Unicode/character code of the symbol (required for: insert-symbol)
Character spacing in points (null = don't change)
Color
PpDateTimeFormat value (1-13) (required for: insert-datetime)
Font name containing the symbol (e.g. "Wingdings") (required for: insert-symbol)
FontSize
Indent level 0-4 (required for: set-bullets)
Italic
Line spacing in points (null = don't change)
Text to find and make into a hyperlink (required for: insert-link)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Replacement text (required for: replace)
Text to find (required for: find, replace)
Session ID from 'session open' command
Shape name (required for: get, set, format, format-advanced, set-spacing, set-bullets, insert-link, change-case, read-spacing, read-bullets, insert-symbol, insert-datetime, insert-slide-number)
0 for all slides, or specific 1-based index (required)
Space after paragraph in points (null = don't change)
Space before paragraph in points (null = don't change)
Set strikethrough (null = don't change)
Set subscript (null = don't change)
Set superscript (null = don't change)
(required for: set)
Set underline (null = don't change)
URL for the hyperlink (required for: insert-link)
VerticalAlignment

Command.Name: transition
Command.Description: Slide transition effects: get, set, remove.

Option.Description: Auto-advance after N seconds (0 = disabled) (required for: set)
Whether to advance on mouse click (required for: set)
Duration in seconds (required for: set)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
1-based slide index (required)
PpEntryEffect enum value (e.g. 3844=Fade, 3849=Push) (required for: set)

Command.Name: vba
Command.Description: VBA macro operations: list modules, view/import/delete code, run macros. Requires VBA trust settings enabled in PowerPoint.

Option.Description: VBA code to import (required for: import)
Fully qualified macro name (e.g., "Module1.MyMacro") (required for: run)
Name for the new module (required for: view, import, delete)
1=Standard, 2=ClassModule (default: 1) (required for: import)
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command

Command.Name: window
Command.Description: PowerPoint window management: get info, minimize, restore, maximize.

Option.Description: Write output to file instead of stdout. For image results, decodes and saves as binary file.
Session ID from 'session open' command
1=Normal, 2=Outline, 3=SlideSorter, 4=NotesPage, 5=SlideMaster (required for: set-view)
Zoom percentage (e.g. 100 for 100%) (required for: set-zoom)
